subject: english

sections.heading: Passage (Part 1)
sections.content: The passage is adopted from the New Atlas of the Universe by Patrick Moore. It centres on Meteors, the junior members of the solar system.

sections.heading: Passage (Part 2)
sections.content: They are small and very plentiful in the solar system. There are two types of Meteors; showers and sporadic meteor. Evaluation: Questions, Page 152.

learning_objectives: Answer comprehension questions based on Comprehension: Meteors
Identify key ideas and details in Comprehension: Meteors
